issues.description: Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. The effect trashes from deck (top of deck), not from hand. Should be 'ForceDiscard' with source 'Deck' or similar deck-trash mechanism. However, standard DSL may not have explicit deck-trash; this needs clarification or a custom action.
Trashing 'from the top of your deck' requires source specification (Deck), not a card filter. Current filter={} suggests hand cards.
Condition 'HasCardOnBoard' with name 'Straw Hat Crew' is incorrect. Should be 'LeaderHasType' to check if Leader has {Straw Hat Crew} type, not if a card named 'Straw Hat Crew' is on board.
Action 'PlayFromHand' is incorrect. The effect adds card from trash to hand, so should be 'ReturnToHand' with filter specifying trash source and name exclusion for Tony Tony.Chopper.
Filter uses 'excludeSelf' but should exclude by card name 'Tony Tony.Chopper'. Format should be 'excludeName' or similar name-based exclusion.
